phase_history.notes: Dual-path resonant percussion engine. Signal chain: trigger → noise burst → dual SVF filter → distortion → FX (tape delay / ring mod / vintage plate) → switchable feedback loop. 18 parameters. Antilope-inspired aesthetic: black, gold, Neve-style buttons, Dune vibe.

Complexity 4/5. TPT SVF dual filter with self-oscillation guard. Sunn O))) MOSFET distortion topology. Switchable feedback loop (1-sample delay, tanh clamp). FX engine: tape delay + ring mod + Dattorro plate. 6 implementation phases. Reuses BeadyEye Dattorro structs.

v1 design complete. 1000×500 WebView UI. Gold SVG manuscript artwork background. All 18 parameters as draggable Neve puck controls (red/black/blue/grey). Cherry MX trigger buttons i/ii with LED flash. FX type selector (TAPE/RING/PLATE). Feedback path pill toggle. Canvas VU meter 24-segment (red/gold/blue zones, peak hold). Voronoi SVG decoration. Full JUCE bridge stubs.

framework_selection.rationale: Rich visual aesthetic (gold ornaments, Neve-style buttons, coloured mechanical triggers) requires HTML/CSS design tooling. Visage would need extensive custom C++ drawing. WebView precedent confirmed working via BeadyEye.

concept.signal_chain: trigger → noise burst (AD envelope) → dual resonant SVF filter → distortion (Sunn O))) MOSFET topology) → FX engine → switchable feedback → output
concept.aesthetic: black background, gold ornaments, Neve-style red/blue buttons, pseudo-medieval/Dune-futuristic
